name: simulate_loan
description: Run one or more loan simulations for a property. Supports Pag-IBIG, specific bank presets, and custom amortization. Returns monthly payment, total interest, DTI ratio, and eligibility details. Always call this before stating any amortization figure to the user.

listing_id.description: UUID of the listing. Used to look up the property price automatically.

property_price.description: Property price in PHP. Required if listing_id is not provided.

modes.description: Which loan programs to simulate. Include 'pagibig' if the user is a Pag-IBIG member. Include one or more bank codes to compare. Default: ['pagibig', 'bank_bpi', 'bank_bdo'].

custom_annual_rate_pct.description: Annual interest rate in percent for 'custom' mode.

include_stress_test.description: If true, also run the stress test (+200 bps rate shock, 20% income drop, and OFW FX shock if applicable).

include_hidden_costs.description: If true, append a hidden-cost breakdown (DST, transfer tax, registration, notarial, broker, moving).
